title: WORKFORCE EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: LATINO COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION WORKFORCE EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides workforce development assistance including computer training, tutoring in English or ESL classes, application assistance, resume assistance, small business development workshops and advice, and information and referral for employment and training opportunities. 2680 NE Twin Knolls Drive Suite 110 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but focus is on individuals who identify as Latino or Hispanic Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 10am-5pm, Tuesday 10am-7pm Email (541) 382-4366 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 382-4366 Alternate (541) 788-4829 ext 0 Brent Walters [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Annual membership fee: $20 and up Class registration fee: $30 Optional book fee: $15 DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Business Development * Hispanic/Latino Community Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers * Hispanic/Latino Community English as a Second Language * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY EMPOWERMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LATINO COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
